# MajorDom Docs

> MajorDom documentation

MajorDom is a self-hosted smart-home hub. This documentation covers building device
integrations (Matter, Zigbee, HomeKit, etc.) and the Hub/Bridge/Cloud HTTP/WebSocket APIs.


## Device Integration

- [Overview](https://docs.majordom.io/device-integration/index.md)
- [Implementing a Controller](https://docs.majordom.io/device-integration/controller/index.md)
- [Storing Data](https://docs.majordom.io/device-integration/storing_data/index.md)
- [Data Models](https://docs.majordom.io/device-integration/data_models/index.md)
- [Example Integration](https://docs.majordom.io/device-integration/example-integration/index.md)
- [Overview](https://docs.majordom.io/device-integration/discovery/index.md)
- [BLE](https://docs.majordom.io/device-integration/discovery/ble/index.md)
- [SSDP / UPnP](https://docs.majordom.io/device-integration/discovery/ssdp/index.md)
- [Zeroconf / mDNS](https://docs.majordom.io/device-integration/discovery/zeroconf/index.md)

## API

- [Hub API](https://docs.majordom.io/api/hub/index.md)
- [Bridge API](https://docs.majordom.io/api/bridge/index.md)
- [Cloud API](https://docs.majordom.io/api/cloud/index.md)


## Example Integrations (full source)

Complete source of each example integration — load one to write your own:

- [Integration SDK — full source](https://docs.majordom.io/llms/integration-sdk.txt)
- [Integration template (scaffold) — full source](https://docs.majordom.io/llms/integration-template.txt)
- [Matter integration (example) — full source](https://docs.majordom.io/llms/integration-matter.txt)
- [Zigbee integration (example) — full source](https://docs.majordom.io/llms/integration-zigbee.txt)
- [HomeKit integration (example) — full source](https://docs.majordom.io/llms/integration-homekit.txt)
